content: We can repurpose the cross-domain semantic alignment framework from knowledge fusion to resolve the long-standing feature prediction collapse issue in 2025 ICM-based curious autonomous agents: aligning the agent's internally learned semantic feature space of explored environments to a grounded open-domain knowledge graph's semantic network, turning sparse, unstructured novelty signals into structured intrinsic rewards.
source_topics: Semantic network alignment for cross-domain knowledge fusion
trigger_topic: Semantic network alignment for cross-domain knowledge fusion
